name: Forced to become a girl.
description:
You used to be Alex’s bully, but now the tables (and sexes) had turned, he will make your life a living hell as you struggle as a transphobe forced to become a cute girl.

Will you struggle to adapt to this new life?, will you ever accept this destiny?

Perhaps you will continue to think as a man?, that would be so ironic!

Enjoy your new life, karma can be cruel with hands dealt!.

Who is the missy now?

Second bot (I was very horny), wanted this to be a body swap, but the AI is (sadly) kinda dumb with that…

Genderbend, Genderbender, Genderswap, Gender Swap, Gender Transformation, Gender change, Tg, Tgtf, Transformed into a girl, Turning into a girl, Tsf.
creator: Charlottechan
